'''hobachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:racegoing|racegoing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:racegoing|racegoing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hobachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hobachithi|hobachithi]] || [[word:hobachiji|hobachiji]] || [[word:hobachishi|hobachishi]] || [[word:hobachiki|hobachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hobachuthuthu|hobachuthuthu]] || [[word:hobachujuju|hobachujuju]] || [[word:hobachushushu|hobachushushu]] || [[word:hobachukuku|hobachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hobachuthu|hobachuthu]] || [[word:hobachuju|hobachuju]] || [[word:hobachushu|hobachushu]] || [[word:hobachuku|hobachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hobachufthuf|hobachufthuf]] || [[word:hobachufjuf|hobachufjuf]] || [[word:hobachufshuf|hobachufshuf]] || [[word:hobachufkuf|hobachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hobachethe|hobachethe]] || [[word:hobacheje|hobacheje]] || [[word:hobacheshe|hobacheshe]] || [[word:hobacheke|hobacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hobachothotho|hobachothotho]] || [[word:hobachojojo|hobachojojo]] || [[word:hobachoshosho|hobachoshosho]] || [[word:hobachokoko|hobachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hobachotho|hobachotho]] || [[word:hobachojo|hobachojo]] || [[word:hobachosho|hobachosho]] || [[word:hobachoko|hobachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hobachofthof|hobachofthof]] || [[word:hobachofjof|hobachofjof]] || [[word:hobachofshof|hobachofshof]] || [[word:hobachofkof|hobachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfthĂŻf|hobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfjĂŻf|hobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfshĂŻf|hobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfkĂŻf|hobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfthĂŻf|hobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfjĂŻf|hobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfshĂŻf|hobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfkĂŻf|hobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfthĂŻf|hobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfjĂŻf|hobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfshĂŻf|hobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hobachĂŻfkĂŻf|hobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hobachĂŠthĂŠ|hobachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hobachĂŠjĂŠ|hobachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hobachĂŠshĂŠ|hobachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hobachĂŠkĂŠ|hobachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hobachathatha|hobachathatha]] || [[word:hobachajaja|hobachajaja]] || [[word:hobachashasha|hobachashasha]] || [[word:hobachakaka|hobachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hobachatha|hobachatha]] || [[word:hobachaja|hobachaja]] || [[word:hobachasha|hobachasha]] || [[word:hobachaka|hobachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hobachafthaf|hobachafthaf]] || [[word:hobachafjaf|hobachafjaf]] || [[word:hobachafshaf|hobachafshaf]] || [[word:hobachafkaf|hobachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hobachasha|hobachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hobachshĂ«sha|hobachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hobachrosha|hobachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hobachmusha|hobachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hobachyasha|hobachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohobachnkshĂ«sha|gohobachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohobachnkrosha|gohobachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohobachnkmusha|gohobachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohobachnkyasha|gohobachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hobabachasha|hobabachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hobabachshĂ«sha|hobabachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hobabachrosha|hobabachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hobabachmusha|hobabachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hobabachyasha|hobabachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohobabachnkshĂ«sha|gohobabachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohobabachnkrosha|gohobabachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohobabachnkmusha|gohobabachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohobabachnkyasha|gohobabachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hebĂŠchasha|hebĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hebĂŠchshĂ«sha|hebĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hebĂŠchrosha|hebĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hebĂŠchmusha|hebĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hebĂŠchyasha|hebĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gohebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohebĂŠchnkrosha|gohebĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohebĂŠchnkmusha|gohebĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohebĂŠchnkyasha|gohebĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hobfachasha|hobfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hobfachshĂ«sha|hobfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hobfachrosha|hobfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hobfachmusha|hobfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hobfachyasha|hobfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohobfachnkshĂ«sha|gohobfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohobfachnkrosha|gohobfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohobfachnkmusha|gohobfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohobfachnkyasha|gohobfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
